zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Blount於1465年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾曼古特斯費爾德時，她的父親Edmund Blount37歲，母親Margaret Seymour36歲。她和Sir John Hungerford MP至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1531年5月23日在英國格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼享年66歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾希雷斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Blount于1465年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾曼古特斯費爾德时，她的父亲Edmund Blount37岁，母亲Margaret Seymour36岁。她和Sir John Hungerford MP至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1531年5月23日在英国格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼享年66岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾希雷斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Blount was born in 1465, in Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Edmund Blount, was 37 and her mother, Margaret Seymour, was 36. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Sir John Hungerford MP. She died on 23 May 1531, in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Blount est née en 1465, à Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Blount, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Seymour, avait 36 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Sir John Hungerford MP. Elle est décédée le 23 mai 1531, à Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Blount 1465 in Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Blount 37 und ihre Mutter Margaret Seymour 36. Sie hatte mit Sir John Hungerford MP mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Mai 1531 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Blount è nata il nel 1465 nel Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Edmund Blount, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Margaret Seymour, aveva 36 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Sir John Hungerford MP. Morì il 23 maggio 1531, nel Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.Draycot Cerne, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアドレイコト セルン

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Blountが1465年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアマンゴトスフィールドで生まれた時，父Edmund Blountは37歳，母Margaret Seymourは36歳であった。彼女はSir John Hungerford MPとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1531年5月23日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダウン アンプニーで66歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアシアーエンセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Blount(이)가 1465년 영국 그루스스터실르 만고츠필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Blount(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Seymour(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Hungerford MP(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1531년 5월 23일 영국 그루스스터실르 다운 아p니에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 시렌스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Blount nasceu em 1465, em Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Blount, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Seymour, tinha 36 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Sir John Hungerford MP. Ela faleceu em 23 de maio de 1531, em Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Blount родилась в 1465 г. в местности мангоцфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Blount было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Seymour, 36. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Sir John Hungerford MP. Она умерла 23 мая 1531 г. в местности доун ампни, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Blount nació en 1465, en Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Blount, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Margaret Seymour, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Sir John Hungerford MP. Murió el 23 de mayo de 1531, en Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
